TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_United_kingdom, title = United_kingdom, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_kingdom} }

S.FORM: United kingdom hya' ga cyux maki' tay 54 00 N, 2 00 W na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 243,610 sq km (maki' tay 80ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 241,930 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,680 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 64,430,428. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga71% , lhlahuy hya' ga 11.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 17.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga London. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Charles III. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

United kingdom hya' ga cyux maki' tay 54 00 N, 2 00 W na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 243,610 sq km (maki' tay 80ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 241,930 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,680 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 64,430,428. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga71% , lhlahuy hya' ga 11.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 17.10%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga London. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Charles III. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: unite* kiŋ*om ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, * ** w na oʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lon*on. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ iii. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
